falsification_rule_text: The hypothesis is SUPPORTED if the 2007-2010 cumulative real GDP decline in the liberalised-system panel exceeds that of the state-managed panel by at least 3 percentage points, conditional on matching on pre-crisis openness + exchange-rate regime + fiscal space. REFUTED if the gap is less than 1 percentage point or reverses in sign.
falsification_test_text: Cross-country comparison of 2007-2010 cumulative real-GDP decline: liberalised panel (USA/GBR/IRL/ISL) vs state-managed panel (CHN/VNM); liberalised gap >=3pp deeper with p<0.10 conditional on pre-crisis controls supports.
